video_title: AI B-roll: White Cloth Soot Test (candle making)

seconds.vision_desc: folded white cloth draped over the rim of a glass jar candle, soft morning light
faint grey smudge visible on the fabric fold, bench wood warm below
cloth fibers and smudge in sharp focus, jar of cream wax beneath
still composition, light shifting subtly across the cloth
the smudge mark reads clearly against fresh white fabric
jar rim and cloth edge, wax surface smooth below
long still beat, dust motes in the light
final frame of cloth, smudge, and jar on the bench
